content: Remote OK Chief Operating Officer WHYTE <p><strong>About The Role:</strong></p><ul><li>We're a fast-growing ecommerce brand doing $3M in annual revenue and we're looking for a hands-on COO to help us scale to the next level. This is a player-coach role- you'll be building systems and processes while still rolling up your sleeves to get things done. If you thrive in lean, scrappy environments and love turning operational chaos into clarity, we want to hear from you.</li><li>What you'll own</li><li>End-to-end fulfillment operations â including 3PL relationships, shipping carriers, and inventory management</li><li>Day-to-day team management across customer service, operations, and warehouse functions</li><li>Our tech stack (Shopify, ERP, helpdesk tools) and identifying automation opportunities</li><li>Customer experience standards â CS policies, returns/refunds processes, and escalation handling</li><li>Operational KPIs including COGS, fulfillment costs, margins, and CAC â with weekly reporting to the CEO</li><li>Vendor and supplier relationships â contracts, lead times, and supply chain resilience</li><li>Building the SOPs and org structure that get us from $3M to $10M+</li></ul><p>What we're looking for</p><ul><li>3â7 years of operations experience, ideally at a DTC or ecommerce company</li><li>Proven track record building and managing small teams</li><li>Comfort with ecommerce tools â Shopify, 3PL platforms, WMS, and similar systems</li><li>Strong analytical mindset â you're comfortable in spreadsheets and love a good dashboard</li><li>Experience managing supplier and vendor relationships</li><li>A bias for action and the ability to move fast without breaking things</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Compensation:</strong></p><p>Base salary:</p><p>$100-200k</p><p><br></p><p>Why join us</p><ul><li>Real ownership â you'll have a direct line to the CEO and a seat at the table on every major decision</li><li>A business with strong fundamentals and room to grow</li><li>Flexibility and autonomy â we care about results, not hours logged</li><li>The chance to build something from the ground up and grow into a true executive role</li></ul><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><br></p> exec, ops, ecommerce Miami, Miami, Florida, United States 2026-05-27T22:54:01+00:00 Barbados</strong></p><p><strong>Working Hours: 7:30am-4:30pm</strong></p><p><strong>Department: Operations</strong></p><p><strong>Environment: Office</strong></p><p><strong>Type of Employment: Permanent</strong></p><p><br></p><p><br></p><p><strong>The Ideal Candidate</strong></p><p><br></p><p>The Digital Solutions Specialist supports the improvement of Newport Waterâs day-to-day</p><p>operations by helping analyze, refine, and implement more efficient business processes across</p><p>departments, using business applications, automation, and digital tools.</p><p>Working closely with the Operations Team Leader and department teams, this role focuses on</p><p>practical, hands-on process improvements - identifying inefficiencies, documenting and</p><p>simplifying workflows, and implementing solutions that reduce manual work, improve visibility,</p><p>and support lean, scalable operations.</p><p><br></p><p>The role combines business process awareness with digital execution capability, grounded in Lean</p><p>thinking and continuous improvement. The emphasis is on steady, incremental progress (getting</p><p>1% better every day) rather than large-scale transformation initiatives.</p><p><br></p><p>This is a collaborative and execution-focused role, contributing to process and system</p><p>improvements while working alongside internal stakeholders and external technical partners</p><p>where required.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Key Responsibilities</strong></p><p><br></p><p><strong>Business Process Optimization (Lean-Focused)</strong></p><ul><li>Build a working understanding of Newport Waterâs operations and key workflows</li><li>Support teams across Sales, Operations, Finance, and Service in reviewing and improving processes</li><li>Identify inefficiencies, bottlenecks, and sources of waste in day-to-day activities</li><li>Assist in redesigning workflows to improve efficiency, consistency, and client experience</li><li>Apply Lean thinking to simplify processes and reduce unnecessary steps</li><li>Contribute to a culture of continuous improvement through small, practical changes</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Requirements Gathering &amp; Process Mapping</strong></p><ul><li>Work with team members to understand current processes and challenges</li><li>Help identify required data inputs, outputs, and dependencies</li><li>Document current-state and future-state workflows in a clear and practical way</li><li>Support the translation of business needs into structured solution requirements</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Digital Solutions, Automation &amp; AI</strong></p><ul><li>Configure and improve solutions within ERP, CRM, and other business applications</li><li>(including Zoho One)</li><li> Build and maintain automations that reduce manual work and improve accuracy</li><li>Support integration between systems (ERP, CRM, website, e-commerce, etc.)</li><li>Ensure solutions align with agreed process improvements</li><li>Work with external specialists on more advanced integrations or technical implementations when needed</li><li>Assist in applying AI tools where they offer clear, practical benefits</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Business Applications Support</strong></p><ul><li>Support the day-to-day administration and improvement of core business applications</li><li>Help maintain data accuracy, system structure, and user access controls</li><li>Assist in ensuring systems remain reliable and aligned with operational needs</li><li>Escalate or coordinate more complex system issues where required</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Data, Reporting &amp; Visibility</strong></p><ul><li>Build and maintain basic dashboards and reports to support operational visibility</li><li>Help ensure data is accurate and consistently used across systems</li><li>Support leadership with tracking key metrics and performance indicators</li><li>Use data to highlight opportunities for process improvement</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Documentation, SO
